threads.title: Critical Security Patch Released for Apache Log4j
threads.author: SecurityTeam
threads.content: A critical vulnerability has been discovered in Apache Log4j (CVE-2021-44228). All users are advised to update immediately. This affects versions 2.0-beta9 through 2.15.0.

replies_data.author: WhiteHat42
replies_data.content: We've already patched all our systems. Recommended for everyone to do the same ASAP.

replies_data.author: DevSecOps
replies_data.content: What's the recommended update path for users on 2.12.x?

threads.title: OWASP Top 10 2021 - What Changed?
threads.author: PenTestPro
threads.content: Let's discuss the changes in OWASP Top 10 2021 compared to 2017. Notable shifts include the focus on insecure deserialization.

threads.title: XSS Vulnerability in User Profile Page
threads.author: BugHunter01
threads.content: Found a reflected XSS vulnerability in the user profile update functionality. The vulnerability allows arbitrary JavaScript execution.
